title: Current Blockers (Alex-dependent)
content: All revenue blocked on Alex doing ALEX-UNBLOCK.md (10 min). Blockers: 1) Stripe activation (payments), 2) oddlyuseful.io DNS pointing to Vercel, 3) Twitter/Reddit account access (distribution), 4) Discord bot routing (WhatsApp channel can't post to Discord). These have been blocking since Day 1 (Mar 4). 5+ consecutive sessions with no progress.
